nasb.text: Yet if he will not redeem the field, but has sold the field to another man, it may no longer be redeemed;

esv.text: But if he does not wish to redeem the field, or if he has sold the field to another man, it shall not be redeemed anymore.

cnv.text: 如果他不贖回田地，而賣給別人，他就再也不能贖回田地了。

ccb.text: 他如果没有赎回土地，而是卖给别人，便再也不能赎回。
